headline: Cyber Joins 4 Resilience Themes for 2026. The 3 ETFs Catching the Trade
summary: State Street’s 2026 Global ETF Outlook flags a resilience pivot that reaches beyond traditional defensive assets. On page 13, the firm writes that “Early 2026 indications suggest we may be in for a year with an even greater focus on resiliency themes such as energy, defense, cyber and commodities.” Cyber is the only software-heavy theme ...
